scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: bash scripts/prisma-env-safe.sh && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.test:e2e:integration-test-pack-p3-53: playwright test e2e/auth.setup.ts e2e/shopify-webhook-order-hub.spec.ts e2e/woocommerce-webhook-order-hub.spec.ts e2e/kds-playwright.spec.ts e2e/pos-checkout-e2e.spec.ts e2e/integration-test-pack-p3-53.spec.ts --project=setup --project=chromium-authed
scripts.test:e2e:negative-test-suite-p3-54: playwright test e2e/expired-session-e2e.spec.ts e2e/webhook-replay-idempotency.spec.ts e2e/cross-tenant-e2e.spec.ts e2e/role-permissions-matrix.spec.ts e2e/negative-test-suite-p3-54.spec.ts --project=chromium && playwright test e2e/auth.setup.ts e2e/webhook-replay-idempotency.spec.ts e2e/cross-tenant-e2e.spec.ts e2e/role-permissions-matrix.spec.ts e2e/negative-test-suite-p3-54.spec.ts --project=setup --project=chromium-authed
scripts.test:ci:bundle-size-regression: node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/unit/bundle-budget-gate-p3-59.test.ts tests/unit/bundle-size-regression.test.ts && npm run check:bundle-size-regression
scripts.predev: node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate && node scripts/ensure-prisma-client-default.cjs && node scripts/ensure-sentry-otel-shim.cjs
scripts.dev:setup: node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate && node ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev
scripts.build: node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate && node scripts/ensure-prisma-client-default.cjs && node ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
scripts.analyze: ANALYZE=true node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate && node scripts/ensure-prisma-client-default.cjs && ANALYZE=true node ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
scripts.test:e2e:sprint5: node scripts/check-e2e-storefront-authed.mjs && playwright test e2e/menu-item-media-authed.spec.ts e2e/sprint5-webhook-authed.spec.ts --project=storefront-authed
scripts.e2e:workspace:full: npm run e2e:bootstrap:seed && npm run test:e2e:workspace-smoke
scripts.check: npm run validate:order-write-paths && npm run validate:api-route-registry && npm run audit:api-routes && npm run audit:crons && npm run validate:startup-readiness && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test:security: npm run validate:order-write-paths && npm run validate:api-route-registry && npm run audit:api-routes && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/unit/mutation-access.test.ts tests/unit/legacy-permissions.test.ts tests/unit/customers-rbac.test.ts tests/unit/workspace-order-scope.test.ts tests/unit/global-search-actions-rbac.test.ts scripts.test:e2e:storefront-phase2: npm run storefront:seed-phase2-hello && playwright test e2e/storefront-phase2-cart.spec.ts e2e/storefront-sold-out.spec.ts e2e/storefront-reorder.spec.ts
